headlines.title: Republicans unveil map that carves up Tennessee’s lone Democratic district
headlines.description: Republican legislative leaders in Tennessee on Wednesday released a congressional map proposal they are hoping to put in place before the midterm elections that would eliminate the state's only Democratic-controlled district

headlines.title: Trump’s abrupt U-turn on plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz came after backlash from allies
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump’s abrupt reversal on his plan to help ships go through the Strait of Hormuz came after a key Gulf ally suspended the U.S. military’s ability to use its bases and airspace to carry out the operation, according to two U.S. officials.

headlines.title: Ohio emerges as a key midterm battleground: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Henry J. Gomez explores how Ohio, once a perennial presidential swing state, will be at the center of the 2026 midterm map.

headlines.title: FBI searches offices of top Virginia Democrat who led redistricting efforts
headlines.description: The FBI is searching Virginia state Sen. L. Louise Lucas' office, a key lawmaker who helped lead the state's redistricting push. NBC News' Gary Grumbach details what we know about the investigation.

headlines.title: Trump tries to project ‘progress’ in Iran talks despite defiance from Tehran
headlines.description: NBC News Correspondents Monica Alba and Courtney Kube report on the latest developments in the war with Iran as President Trump appears optimistic a deal is close. Vice President for Policy at the Middle East Institute Ken Pollack discusses the state of play in the war with Iran.

headlines.title: Kornacki: Trump-endorsed wins in Indiana are ‘very clear’ message to defecting Republicans
headlines.description: NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press NOW to analyze results from state Senate primary races in Indiana. NBC News Correspondent Shaquille Brewster reports from on the ground in Indiana as Trump-backed candidates oust many Republican incumbents.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Howard Lutnick evasive during Epstein testimony, House Democrats say
headlines.description: Howard Lutnick said he stopped talking to Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But a House inquiry wants to know why investigative files show otherwise.

headlines.title: FBI searches office of Virginia lawmaker who helped lead redistricting push
headlines.description: The FBI searched the office of a prominent Virginia Democratic state lawmaker who helped lead the state's redistricting push.

headlines.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
headlines.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber in a key battleground state
